title: ERC-20 Transfer History
body: Full paginated ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet and token contract pair.

title: Spot Price Ticker
body: Live spot prices for thousands of tokens indexed by GoldRush across all chains.

title: Token Approval Scanner
body: Identify and audit all ERC-20 token approvals granted by any wallet address.

title: Token Holder List
body: Retrieve a ranked list of holders for any token contract address across chains.

title: Token Metadata API
body: Fetch logos, decimals, contract info, and supply data for any ERC-20 token.

title: Token Transfer Stream
body: Real-time stream of ERC-20 transfers for any token or wallet address.

title: Token Exchange Flow Tracker
body: Track net token inflows and outflows to centralised exchange deposit addresses.

title: Token Memecoin Risk Scorer
body: Score memecoin tokens for launch risk — bundled buys, sniper wallets, and dev wallet size.

title: Token Fee / Revenue Correlation
body: Correlate token price movements with protocol fee generation and revenue data onchain.
